title: Enchant Innovation
description: Transform enchantment mechanics! Items now gain XP through durability loss, using their OWN level for enchantments.
body:
# 📖 Enchant Innovation

**Revolutionize how you enchant items!** This mod replaces player-level-based enchanting with **item-specific progression**, creating deeper gameplay and meaningful gear choices.  

## ✨ Core Features  
  - Items gain 1 XP per durability point consumed.  
  - Leveling formula matches vanilla player progression (e.g., Level 1→2 = 7 XP).  
  - Enchant using **the item's own level** at anvils/enchanting tables.  
  - Player levels no longer consumed for enchanting.  
  - Encourages repairing tools instead of discarding them.  
  - Compatible with all vanilla/most modded items.  

## 🛠️ How It Works  
1. **Earn Item XP**: Mine blocks, attack mobs, or use tools as usual.  
2. **Check Progress**: Hover over items to see their level/XP in tooltips.  
3. **Enchant Strategically**: Save high-level gear for powerful enchantments!    

## 📢 My Other mods
- [ChargedMobs(Fabric/Forge/NeoForge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/charged-mobs):  Added more types charged mobs
-  [Weapon Grease(Fabric/Forge/Neoforge))](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapon-grease):  Coat a weapon with Grease to gain an enhancement
